summary: Tested Observatoire personalized features (Prédictions and Détectées CV tabs). All features working correctly. Backend APIs return personalized data. Frontend displays personalized predictions with sectors, emerging/declining skills, and global market trends reference section.

issues: React key warning: duplicate keys for sector predictions (Informatique-0, Administration-0, Commerce-0) - minor code quality issue, doesn't affect functionality

action_items: MINOR: Fix React key warning in ObservatoireView.jsx - use unique keys for PredictionCard components (lines 816-820, 855-858)
critical_code_review_comments: Prédictions tab correctly shows 'Personnaliser mes prédictions' button by default
After clicking button, personalized predictions load with sectors, emerging skills (green badges), and declining skills (red badges)
'Tendances globales du marché (référence)' section appears below personalized predictions as expected
Détectées CV tab correctly shows 4 personalized emerging skills for testboost user with scores and categories
GET /api/emerging/observatory returns top_emerging, by_category, by_level - all personalized to user's CV
GET /api/observatoire/personalized returns sector_relevance with your_emerging_skills and your_declining_skills
context_for_next_testing_agent: Observatoire personalized features fully tested. testboost user has 28 skills analyzed, 4 CV-detected emerging skills, 6 sector relevance entries. bob30 user has 3 CV-detected emerging skills. Both endpoints /api/emerging/observatory and /api/observatoire/personalized working correctly with GPT-5.2 AI analysis.

backend.GET /api/emerging/observatory?token=TOKE: PASS - Returns personalized top_emerging (4 for testboost), by_category, by_level
backend.GET /api/observatoire/personalized?token: PASS - Returns sector_relevance with your_emerging_skills, your_declining_skills, matches, skill_gaps
backend.GET /api/observatoire/sector-trends: PASS - Returns sector trends with transformation_index

frontend.Prédictions tab initial state: PASS - Shows 'Personnaliser mes prédictions' button with global predictions below
frontend.Prédictions tab after personalization: PASS - Shows personalized sectors with emerging/declining skills, hiring trends, alerts
frontend.Tendances globales du marché section: PASS - Appears below personalized predictions as reference
frontend.Détectées CV tab: PASS - Shows 4 personalized emerging skills with scores (65, 58, 57, 54), categories, and levels
frontend.Navigation to Le Marché > Observatoire: PASS - All 7 inner tabs visible (Vue d'ensemble, Compétences, Secteurs, Signaux Ubuntoo, Prédictions, Contributions, Détectées CV)

top_emerging_skills: Conception de parcours d'insertion personnalisés (score: 58, category: methodologique)
Orientation vers l'offre de formation (score: 57, category: sectorielle)
Animation et facilitation de dynamiques de groupe (score: 54, category: soft_skill_avancee)
sectors_with_personalized_data: Insertion professionnelle (France Travail, Missions Locales, PLIE, IAE) - Embauches en hausse
Collectivités territoriales / guichets de proximité - Stable
Action sociale / médico-social - Embauches en hausse
